summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Student Dashboard features for Speakking AI Voice Translation Coach. All major new features are working correctly including progress tracking, badge system, realistic 3D character, and weekly activity charts.

ui_bugs.issue: Microphone button disabled and webpack overlay blocking interactions
ui_bugs.note: Webpack dev server overlay interfering with lesson session interactions. Audio play() requests interrupted.

integration_issues.issue: Progress page redirects to landing when accessed directly
integration_issues.note: May require authentication state check for direct URL access

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Student Dashboard loads correctly via İlerlemem button
Realistic 3D Speaky character displays on landing page and dashboard
Progress stats display (Toplam Ders: 4, Toplam Süre: 1.6 dk, Düzeltme: 0, Seviye: A1)
Badge system with 28+ badge elements (earned and locked states)
Weekly activity chart renders correctly (Haftalık Aktivite)
İlerlemem button visible in header after login
Speaky character visible in lesson session
Text mode chat input and send button
Badge data structure validation (earned_count, total_count, badges array)
Progress data structure validation (total_sessions, total_minutes, weekly_stats)
Weekly stats format validation (7 days array)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Resolve webpack dev server overlay blocking lesson session interactions, 2) Fix audio play() request interruption in lesson sessions, 3) Consider adding authentication state check for direct /progress URL access
